ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS OF $390.00 AGAINST DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL SHALL PAY SANCTIONS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH RILES; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling to Plaintiff FUND RECOVERY SERVICES, INC.'S Motion to Compel Answers to Post Judgment Discovery; and for Award of Monetary Sanctions as follows: Motion Granted. Defendant is ordered to produce response within 15 days of this order. Sanctions of $390.00 against Defendant and Defendant's counsel are awarded to Plaintiff. Defendant and Defendant's counsel shall pay sanctions within 15 days of this order. Order signed by the court. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth Riles; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2003 Off Calendar
